## Checklist

- [ ] Builds cleanly (`cmake --build build`) and the app runs
- [ ] Stays distro-agnostic (no hardcoded paths, no DE/shell coupling)
- [ ] Optional features still degrade gracefully when their tool is absent
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots (a couple of window sizes for layout work)
- [ ] Updated docs / CHANGELOG if user-facing
